The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Sibilant Scullery

Air resists with malevolent force.
Corners hide watchful presences.
Escape illusions lead to cosmic chorus.
Seeds destroy outward.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • I came From 🌀 1 down
  • West's a dead end
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
  • S S S S W N N N W S S S S E S E S S W W N W S W N :)
  • Hoi
  • (5) Отдел кадров
